title: Seratonin or dopamine problem
content:
Seratonin or dopamine problem
Regularly feel on edge for the point that I need a substance to calm down
This has drastically increased my emotional
When I get anxious I drink
And then the next morning, I feel tired, insecure, and severely depressed
After that I feel bad about myself
context: From document: Seratonin or dopamine problem
